Records.description: Tutorial 2-loop 3-point Feynman integral with 5 internal propagators all of mass $m$, two massless on-shell legs ($p_0, p_1$) and one off-shell leg $p_2$, evaluated in $D = 2 - 2\varepsilon$ dimensions using tropical Monte Carlo integration with $N=1\mathrm{e}7$ samples up to $\varepsilon^4$. Phase space point $m^2 = 0.2$, $p_2^2 = 1$ (Minkowski regime). Used as the introductory worked example for feyntrop in Section 4.2.
Records.familyName: Two-loop three-point sunrise-type tutorial integral (5 massive propagators)
Records.location: Section 4.2 (Basic usage of feyntrop), eq. after 'The momentum space Feynman integral representation'; tutorial_2L_3pt.ipynb

Names: Two-loop three-point sunrise-type tutorial integral (5 massive propagators)
